body_text: Hi {{1}}, this is Coach Perry. Track practice {{2}} runs {{3}} at Crestwood High. Reply STOP to opt out.
name: practice_update

body_text: Reminder: your physical therapy appointment with Shannon Perry, DPT on {{1}} at {{2}} is confirmed at Iron City Sports Medicine.
name: appointment_reminder

body_text: Hi {{1}}, the {{2}} bus leaves Crestwood at {{3}}. Athletes need spikes, uniform, and water. Reply with any questions.
name: meet_logistics

body_text: Hi {{1}}, confirming Devon's recruiting visit to {{2}} on {{3}}. Coach Perry will be driving. Bring transcript and ID.
name: recruiting_visit

body_text: Family reminder from Shannon: {{1}} at Mama's on {{2}}. Let me know what you're bringing.
name: family_checkin

body_text: New Hope AME reminder: {{1}} on {{2}} at {{3}}. Men's choir, please be in your seats by 9.
name: church_reminder

body_text: Hi {{1}}, Dr. Lawson asked me to cover {{2}} on {{3}}. Front desk will adjust your schedule. Thanks for the heads up.
name: clinic_schedule

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your eligibility and physical form for the {{2}} track season is due {{3}}. Get it signed and back to Coach Perry.
name: eligibility_form

body_text: Heads up {{1}}: weather is moving practice {{2}}. We'll be in the gym at {{3}} instead of the track.
name: weather_alert

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your home rehab program for {{2}} is attached. Sets and reps are listed. Text me if anything flares up.
name: rehab_protocol

body_text: Reminder: the Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K is {{1}} at {{2}}. Packet pickup opens {{3}}.
name: charity_5k

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your verification code for the Crestwood team portal is {{2}}. It expires in 10 minutes.
name: portal_otp

body_text: Hi {{1}}, did Coach Perry's session for {{2}} work out today? Reply 1 for yes, 2 if you need to reschedule.
name: session_followup

body_text: Hi {{1}}, Devon's {{2}} session is Tuesday and Thursday at 5:30 PM. Confirm the location at Crestwood High.
name: sprint_session

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your Saturday long run leaves the Crestwood South loop at {{2}}. Distance today is {{3}} miles.
name: long_run

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your new-patient evaluation with Shannon Perry, DPT is on {{2}}. Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete intake.
name: new_patient_eval

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your verified {{2}} marks have been added to the recruiting packet for {{3}}.
name: marks_update

body_text: Hi {{1}}, parent meeting for the {{2}} track season is {{3}} in the Crestwood gym. Please plan to attend.
name: parent_meeting

body_text: Hi {{1}}, your insurance copay of {{2}} for today's PT visit at Iron City Sports Medicine is due at the front desk.
name: copay_reminder

body_text: Hi {{1}}, the Crestwood Cross Country Invitational is {{2}} at Oak Mountain. Warmups start {{3}}. Go Knights!
name: xc_invite

body_text: Hi {{1}}, Sunday dinner is at Brenda's at 2:00 after the {{2}} service. Bring {{3}} if you can.
name: sunday_dinner
